- Jan 1 2006 = Saturday + (365) = Sunday? Actually add 365 mod 7 = +1, so Monday? Wait: Saturday + 365 = Saturday + (365 mod 7 = 1) = Sunday. So Jan 1 2006 = Sunday.

- Jan 1 2018 = Sunday + 365 = Monday.

- Jan 1 2022 = Friday + 365 = Saturday.
